zh.meta.description: Terry Chien 的個人網站，整理研究方向、專案、教學筆記、發表與聯絡資訊。
zh.nav.label: 主要導覽
zh.language.label: 語言切換
zh.hero.subtitle: 臺灣大學電信工程學研究所碩士生，物理學系背景
zh.hero.text: 這裡整理我的研究方向、專案紀錄、發表與經歷。網站以免費靜態架構維護，之後可以逐步加入 CV、論文頁面或部落格。
zh.about.title: 關於我
zh.about.body1: 我畢業於臺灣大學物理學系，目前就讀臺灣大學電信工程學研究所，專注於通訊工程、訊號處理與陣列設計相關主題。
zh.about.body2: 這個網站整理我的研究、模擬、工程實作、教學筆記與專案成果，並保持簡潔、可讀、容易維護。
zh.experience.title: 經歷
zh.experience.mediatek.role: 5G PHY 通訊演算法實習生
zh.experience.mediatek.description: 參與 5G PHY 通訊演算法相關實作與分析，累積無線通訊系統與工程開發經驗。
zh.experience.project.description: 延續原子與分子物理相關研究主題，進行專題研究、文獻整理與實驗/理論分析。
zh.experience.intern.description: 於中研院原子與分子科學研究所參與暑期實習，接觸研究流程與量子/原子系統相關題目。
zh.research.title: 研究方向
zh.research.sparse: 探索稀疏陣列配置、自由度與成像或估測效能之間的關係。
zh.research.signal: 整理通訊與陣列訊號處理中的模型、演算法與模擬工具。
zh.research.optimization: 以最佳化方法搜尋具備限制條件的陣列結構與效能指標。
zh.research.wireless: 建立無線通訊系統模擬與分析，連結理論與實驗結果。
zh.projects.title: 專案
zh.tutorials.title: 教學筆記
zh.publications.title: 論文與發表
zh.contact.title: 聯絡方式
zh.contact.body: 歡迎透過 GitHub 聯絡我。正式上線前，可以再補上 email、CV 連結與其他社群連結。
zh.footer.text: Terry Chien. 使用靜態 HTML、CSS 與 JavaScript 建置。

en.meta.description: Personal website of Terry Chien, featuring research interests, projects, tutorials, publications, and contact information.
en.nav.label: Primary navigation
en.language.label: Language switcher
en.hero.subtitle: Master's student at the NTU Graduate Institute of Communication Engineering, with a background in Physics.
en.hero.text: This site collects my research interests, project notes, publications, and experience. It is maintained as a free static website and can later grow into a CV, paper pages, or a blog.
en.about.title: About Me
en.about.body1: I studied Physics at National Taiwan University and am currently a master's student at the NTU Graduate Institute of Communication Engineering, focusing on communication engineering, signal processing, and array design.
en.about.body2: This site collects my research, simulations, engineering work, tutorial notes, and project outcomes while staying clean, readable, and easy to maintain.
en.experience.title: Experience
en.experience.mediatek.description: Worked on implementation and analysis related to 5G PHY communication algorithms, gaining experience in wireless systems and engineering development.
en.experience.project.description: Continued research work related to atomic and molecular physics, including literature review, project development, and theoretical or experimental analysis.
en.experience.intern.description: Participated in a summer research internship at IAMS, Academia Sinica, and worked on topics related to quantum and atomic systems.
en.research.title: Research Interests
en.research.sparse: Exploring sparse array configurations and the relationship between degrees of freedom, imaging, and estimation performance.
en.research.signal: Studying models, algorithms, and simulation tools in communication and array signal processing.
en.research.optimization: Using optimization methods to search for constrained array structures and performance metrics.
en.research.wireless: Building wireless communication simulations and analysis that connect theory with experimental results.
en.projects.title: Projects
en.tutorials.title: Tutorials
en.publications.title: Publications
en.contact.title: Contact
en.contact.body: Feel free to reach out through GitHub. Email, CV, and additional social links can be added before the site is finalized.
en.footer.text: Terry Chien. Built with static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

publications.title: Efficient and high-fidelity entanglement in cavity QED without high cooperativity
